1.text: THE DUBAI INTERNATIONAL FINANCIAL CENTRE COURTS

9.text: ORDER OF SCT JUDGE MAITHA ALSHEHHI

10.text: UPON the Judgment of SCT Judge Maitha AlShehhi dated 4 October 2024 ordering the Claimant to provide the Court with 3 quotations refl ecting fl ight tickets to Sri Lanka

11.text: AND UPON the Claimant fi ling 3 quotations refl ecting fl ight tickets to Sri Lanka on 5 October 2024

12.text: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT the Second Defendant shall pay the Claimant the amount of AED 780 as payment in lieu of fl ight ticket from Dubai to Sri Lanka.
